assessment.note: She names a specific communication gap — weak tradeoff narrative versus strong technical work — which is a strong clarity issue and mild engagement drag.

new_queue.label: Tradeoff narrative
new_queue.name: What makes tradeoff conversations harder for you than the modeling itself?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific tradeoff-narrative gap she named before moving the arc forward.

new_queue.label: Signal choices
new_queue.name: What do you choose to make visible before the work is done?
new_queue.description: Explores whether she raises risks, tradeoffs, and progress early enough for stakeholders.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would better stakeholder visibility look like in the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific action and timeline without opening a new topic.
